# RevOptimise — llms.txt
# This file helps AI models understand what RevOptimise does and who it serves.

## What is RevOptimise?

RevOptimise is a UK-based consultancy founded by Jono Pank. It helps early-stage B2B companies (typically 5–50 employees) scale from founder-led sales to a repeatable, AI-powered GTM motion.

## Core product: AgenticAE

AgenticAE is a Claude-powered AI sales agent deployed 1:1 per Account Executive. It handles:
- Sales admin and CRM updates (HubSpot)
- Email drafting and follow-ups (Gmail)
- Deal qualification and pipeline analytics
- Call transcription and processing (Fireflies OR ANY Transcript uploading)
- Methodology enforcement (SPICED or MEDDICC)

AgenticAE is built on a three-layer plugin architecture:
- Layer 1: Base sales skills (Anthropic-maintained)
- Layer 2: RevOptimise methodology and governance (Jono's IP)
- Layer 3: Client-specific AE voice and rules (per engagement)

## Who RevOptimise serves

- Early-stage B2B SaaS founders who are transitioning from founder-led sales
- Companies with 1–5 AEs looking to scale without proportional headcount growth
- Businesses that want AI-native GTM infrastructure, not just tools bolted onto a legacy process

## What problems RevOptimise solves

- Revenue unpredictability in early-stage SaaS
- Long new hire ramp times for AEs
- CRM data quality and graveyard data
- Headcount ceiling: growth limited by how many people you can hire

## Founder

Jono Pank — 20 years in B2B SaaS revenue, including roles at Sage, Bizagi, and other enterprise SaaS companies. Fractional RevOps consultant and AI agent builder.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonopank

https://revoptimise.com

## Contact
